_comment: Source of truth for nodes/edges. Sync DATA object in index.html after edits here.

mechanical.description: Physical systems, materials, manufacturing, fluids, structures

electrical.description: Circuits, power, RF, PCB, sensors, semiconductors

physics.description: Foundational physical theory underlying all engineering

energy.description: Renewables, storage, grids, hydrogen, power systems

mathematics.description: The language underlying all quantitative engineering

nodes.label:
Engineering
Disciplines
nodes.desc: The intersection of all engineering and tech disciplines. Navigate to explore fields and their connections.

nodes.label:
Mechanical
Engineering
nodes.desc: Design and analysis of physical systems — mechanics, thermodynamics, materials, manufacturing.

nodes.label:
Electrical
Engineering
nodes.desc: Design of electrical systems, circuits, and power — from high-voltage to microelectronics.

nodes.label:
Information
Technology
nodes.desc: Software, algorithms, networking, data — from cloud infrastructure to bare-metal firmware.

nodes.label: Physics
nodes.desc: The foundational science underlying all engineering. From classical mechanics to electromagnetism, thermodynamics, and quantum effects.

nodes.label:
Aerospace
Engineering
nodes.desc: Design of aircraft and spacecraft. Combines aerodynamics, propulsion, structures, GNC, and materials at extreme performance margins.

nodes.label:
Biomedical
Engineering
nodes.desc: Engineering applied to medicine and biology. Medical devices, implants, diagnostics, prosthetics, and bioinformatics.

nodes.label:
Energy
Systems
nodes.desc: Generation, storage, and distribution of energy. Renewables, grid infrastructure, hydrogen, and sustainable power.

nodes.label: Mathematics
nodes.desc: The universal language of engineering. Linear algebra, calculus, statistics, and numerical methods underpin every technical discipline.

nodes.label:
Embedded
Systems
nodes.desc: The crossroads of HW and SW. MCUs (STM32, ESP32, RP2040), HAL, drivers, real-time constraints.

nodes.label: Robotics
nodes.desc: Mechanical structure + electrical actuation + sensing + AI control. Arms, mobile robots, drones.

nodes.label:
Mecha-
tronics
nodes.desc: Integration of mechanical and electrical engineering. Servo systems, CNC, industrial automation.

nodes.label: Industry 4.0
nodes.desc: The fourth industrial revolution: smart factories, digital threads, cyber-physical systems, and AI-driven manufacturing.

nodes.label:
Lightweight
Structures
nodes.desc: Maximizing strength-to-weight ratio. Critical for aerospace, automotive, and wearable robotics.

nodes.label:
Material
Selection
nodes.desc: Systematic property evaluation via Ashby charts. Mechanical, thermal, electrical tradeoffs.

nodes.label:
Thermal
Management
nodes.desc: Heat transfer, cooling systems, heat pipes, TIMs. Essential for electronics and high-power systems.

nodes.label:
Additive
Mfg.
nodes.desc: FDM, SLA, SLS, DMLS. Complex geometries impossible with subtractive methods.

nodes.label:
CNC
Machining
nodes.desc: Computer-controlled milling and turning. High-precision metal and plastic parts.

nodes.label:
Fluid
Dynamics
nodes.desc: CFD, aerodynamics, hydraulics. Essential for cooling loops and aerodynamic design.

nodes.label:
Kinematics &
Dynamics
nodes.desc: Motion analysis with and without forces. Foundation for robot arms and linkage design.

nodes.label: Tribology
nodes.desc: Friction, wear, and lubrication. Critical for bearings, gears, seals, and long-life mechanical systems.

nodes.label: MEMS
nodes.desc: Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems. Microscale sensors and actuators fabricated with semiconductor processes.

nodes.label:
PCB
Design
nodes.desc: Schematic capture, layout, routing, DRC. Signal integrity, impedance, manufacturing rules.

nodes.label:
Power
Electronics
nodes.desc: DC-DC converters, inverters, motor drives. High-efficiency energy conversion.

nodes.label:
Sensors &
Measurement
nodes.desc: IMUs, encoders, load cells, pressure/temperature/current sensors.

nodes.label:
Analog
Circuits
nodes.desc: Op-amps, filters, ADC/DAC, signal conditioning. Bridge between physics and digital.

nodes.label:
RF &
Wireless
nodes.desc: Antenna theory, Bluetooth, WiFi, LoRa, 5G. Sub-GHz IoT to mmWave radar.

nodes.label:
FPGA
Design
nodes.desc: Reconfigurable hardware logic. VHDL/Verilog, timing closure, parallel data processing.

nodes.label:
Semiconductor
Devices
nodes.desc: Transistors, diodes, MOSFETs, BJTs. Device physics from doping profiles to I-V characteristics.

nodes.label:
Software
Development
nodes.desc: Paradigms, design patterns, version control. Python, Rust, C/C++ for systems programming.

nodes.label:
Algorithms &
Data Struct
nodes.desc: Sorting, search, graph algorithms, dynamic programming. Foundation of efficient computing.

nodes.label:
Machine
Learning
nodes.desc: Neural networks, CNNs, transformers. From anomaly detection to generative AI.

nodes.label:
Networking &
Protocols
nodes.desc: TCP/IP, CAN bus, SPI, I2C, UART, Ethernet. Chip-level to internet-scale.

nodes.label:
Cyber-
security
nodes.desc: Firmware security, secure boot, encryption, vulnerability analysis.

nodes.label:
Real-Time
Systems
nodes.desc: Deterministic timing, FreeRTOS/Zephyr, interrupt handling, task scheduling.

nodes.label:
Cloud
Computing
nodes.desc: Distributed compute, storage, and services (AWS/GCP/Azure). Microservices, containers, serverless.

nodes.label:
Data
Engineering
nodes.desc: Pipelines, warehousing, streaming (Kafka, Spark). Turning raw data into analysis-ready datasets.

nodes.label:
HPC &
Parallel Comp.
nodes.desc: High-performance computing, MPI, OpenMP, GPU clusters. Essential for simulation and large ML workloads.

nodes.label:
Control
Systems
nodes.desc: PID, state-space, Kalman filters. Bridges physical plant dynamics with digital algorithms.

nodes.label:
Internet
of Things
nodes.desc: Connected embedded devices with cloud backends. Sensor nets, MQTT, OTA updates.

nodes.label:
Digital
Twins
nodes.desc: Real-time virtual replicas of physical systems. CAD + simulation + sensor data + ML.

nodes.label:
Autonomous
Systems
nodes.desc: Self-driving vehicles, drones, inspection robots. Perception + planning + control + hardware.

nodes.label:
Edge AI &
TinyML
nodes.desc: Neural nets on MCUs and embedded GPUs. TF Lite, ONNX, quantization.

nodes.label:
Wearable
Tech
nodes.desc: Body-worn electronics combining miniaturized sensors, BLE, flexible PCBs, and low-power MCUs.

nodes.label:
Smart
Manufacturing
nodes.desc: AI-driven production lines, predictive maintenance, real-time quality control, and digital workflows.

nodes.label:
Aero-
dynamics
nodes.desc: Subsonic, transonic, supersonic and hypersonic flow. Lift, drag, boundary layers, shock waves.

nodes.label:
Propulsion
Systems
nodes.desc: Jet engines, rockets, turbofans, electric propulsion. Thermodynamic cycle analysis and combustion.

nodes.label:
Aero-
structures
nodes.desc: Aircraft structural analysis under combined aero and inertial loads. Flutter, aeroelasticity, fatigue life.

nodes.label:
Guidance Nav
& Control
nodes.desc: Trajectory planning, attitude control, inertial navigation for aircraft and spacecraft.

nodes.label:
Orbital
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Kepler orbits, delta-V maneuvers, launch windows, satellite constellation design.

nodes.label:
Classical
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Newtonian, Lagrangian and Hamiltonian mechanics. The mathematical backbone of structural and mechanical analysis.

nodes.label:
Electro-
magnetism
nodes.desc: Maxwell's equations, fields, waves, and electromagnetic induction. Foundation of all electrical engineering.

nodes.label:
Thermo-
dynamics
nodes.desc: Laws of thermodynamics, entropy, statistical mechanics. Governs heat engines and energy conversion.

nodes.label:
Optics &
Photonics
nodes.desc: Wave optics, lasers, fiber optics, LiDAR. Enabling optical sensing, communication, and display tech.

nodes.label:
Quantum
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Particle-wave duality, quantum states, tunneling. Foundation of semiconductor physics and quantum computing.

nodes.label:
Medical
Devices
nodes.desc: FDA-regulated hardware for diagnostics and therapy. Combines mechanical design, electronics, firmware, and biocompatibility.

nodes.label:
Bio-
mechanics
nodes.desc: Mechanical analysis of biological structures — bones, joints, soft tissue, gait analysis.

nodes.label:
Bio-
sensors
nodes.desc: Electrochemical, optical, and piezoelectric sensors for detecting biological molecules.

nodes.label:
Medical
Imaging
nodes.desc: MRI, CT, ultrasound, X-ray. Signal acquisition, image reconstruction and AI-assisted diagnosis.

nodes.label:
Neuro-
technology
nodes.desc: Brain-computer interfaces, neural signal recording, deep brain stimulation.

nodes.label:
Renewable
Energy
nodes.desc: Solar PV, wind, hydro, tidal. Engineering the transition from fossil fuels to zero-carbon electricity.

nodes.label:
Energy
Storage
nodes.desc: Batteries, supercapacitors, pumped hydro, compressed air. Grid-scale and portable storage systems.

nodes.label:
Smart
Grid
nodes.desc: Digitally controlled electrical grids. Demand response, SCADA, distributed generation, cyber-security.

nodes.label:
Hydrogen &
Fuel Cells
nodes.desc: Green hydrogen production via electrolysis, fuel cell stacks, storage and distribution challenges.

nodes.label:
Linear
Algebra
nodes.desc: Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, transformations. The core language of robotics, ML, and structural analysis.

nodes.label:
Calculus &
Analysis
nodes.desc: Differential and integral calculus, complex analysis. Underlies physics, control theory, and signal processing.

nodes.label:
Statistics &
Probability
nodes.desc: Probability distributions, Bayesian inference, hypothesis testing. Essential for ML, measurement, and reliability.

nodes.label:
Numerical
Methods
nodes.desc: FEM, FDM, FVM, ODE solvers. Turning continuous physics into solvable discrete problems.

nodes.label:
Composite
Materials
nodes.desc: Carbon fiber, fiberglass, hybrid laminates. Extreme stiffness at low weight.

nodes.label:
Topology
Optimization
nodes.desc: Mathematical material distribution for minimum weight. Produces organic, minimal-mass geometries.

nodes.label:
Fatigue &
Fracture
nodes.desc: Cyclic loading failure, S-N curves, crack growth. Critical for structural life prediction.

nodes.label:
Vibration &
NVH
nodes.desc: Natural frequencies, modal analysis, damping. Affects noise, comfort, and structural integrity.

nodes.label:
Signal
Integrity
nodes.desc: Transmission lines, reflections, crosstalk, eye diagrams. Keeping signals clean at high speed.

nodes.label: EMC / EMI
nodes.desc: Shielding, filtering, grounding. Regulatory compliance (CE, FCC) for connected devices.

nodes.label:
Motor
Drivers
nodes.desc: H-bridges, FOC, trapezoidal commutation for brushed DC, BLDC, steppers.

nodes.label:
Battery
Management
nodes.desc: Cell voltage/temp monitoring, balancing, protection circuits, safe charging algorithms.

nodes.label:
Op-Amp
Circuits
nodes.desc: Inverting/non-inverting amps, integrators, differentiators, instrumentation amps and comparators.

nodes.label:
DC-DC
Converters
nodes.desc: Buck, boost, buck-boost topologies. Switching losses, inductor sizing, feedback compensation.

nodes.label:
ASIC
Design
nodes.desc: Custom silicon design flow: RTL, synthesis, place-and-route, DRC/LVS, tape-out.

nodes.label:
Power
Integrity
nodes.desc: PDN impedance, decoupling capacitors, IR drop, simultaneous switching noise. Critical for high-speed digital.

nodes.label:
Computer
Vision
nodes.desc: Object detection, SLAM, depth estimation. Powers autonomous navigation and inspection.

nodes.label:
Operating
Systems
nodes.desc: Scheduling, memory management, file systems, syscalls. Foundation for all software stacks.

nodes.label:
GPU
Programming
nodes.desc: CUDA, OpenCL, Vulkan Compute. Massively parallel workloads for ML training, simulation, and rendering.

nodes.label:
Containers &
Orchestration
nodes.desc: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD. Reproducible, scalable deployment of software and data pipelines.

nodes.label: SLAM
nodes.desc: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping. Fuses IMU, lidar, camera for real-time robot localization.

nodes.label:
Field-Oriented
Control
nodes.desc: High-performance BLDC/PMSM control. Requires current sensing, coordinate transforms, fast MCU.

nodes.label:
Kalman
Filter
nodes.desc: Optimal state estimation from noisy sensor data. Fundamental to navigation, robotics, and control.

nodes.label:
Soft
Robotics
nodes.desc: Compliant, deformable robots from silicone and textiles. Safer human interaction, bio-inspired design.

nodes.label:
Turbo-
machinery
nodes.desc: Compressors, turbines, fans. Blade design, stage analysis, surge/stall margins.

nodes.label:
Thermal
Protection
nodes.desc: Ablative heat shields and TPS tiles for atmospheric reentry. Extreme heat flux at hypersonic speeds.

nodes.label:
Finite Element
Method
nodes.desc: Numerical technique to solve PDEs over complex geometries. Structural, thermal, fluid, and EM analysis.

nodes.label:
Digital Signal
Processing
nodes.desc: Fourier transforms, filters, sampling theory, spectral analysis. Bridges physics and computation.

nodes.label:
Prosthetics &
Exoskeletons
nodes.desc: Motorized limb replacements and assistive exoskeletons. Combines mechanics, actuation, control, and BCI.

nodes.label:
ECG / EEG
Processing
nodes.desc: Acquisition and analysis of cardiac and brain electrical signals. Low-noise analog front-ends and DSP.

nodes.label:
Solar Cell
Design
nodes.desc: PV cell physics, silicon and thin-film technologies, MPPT, panel efficiency and degradation.

nodes.label:
Wind Turbine
Engineering
nodes.desc: Blade aerodynamics, structural fatigue, gearboxes, generators, and grid connection of wind turbines.

nodes.label:
Optimization
Theory
nodes.desc: Gradient descent, convex optimization, linear programming, genetic algorithms. Foundation of ML and design.

nodes.label:
ODEs &
PDEs
nodes.desc: Differential equations governing physical systems. Analytical and numerical solution methods.

nodes.label:
Graph
Theory
nodes.desc: Network topology, shortest paths, spanning trees, graph neural networks. Applicable from routing to ML.

nodes.label:
Programming
Languages
nodes.desc: Theory and practice of programming languages — paradigms, type systems, compilers, and language design principles.

nodes.label:
Software
Architecture
nodes.desc: Structural design of software systems including patterns, modularity, and scalability. Covers microservices, event-driven, and layered architectures.

nodes.label:
Design
Patterns
nodes.desc: Reusable solutions to common software design problems — creational, structural, and behavioral patterns.

nodes.label:
Testing &
Validation
nodes.desc: Systematic verification of software correctness. Covers unit, integration, system, and acceptance testing, TDD, and CI-based quality gates.

nodes.label:
Requirements
Engineering
nodes.desc: Eliciting, documenting, and managing software requirements. Covers use cases, user stories, and traceability.

nodes.label: DevOps
nodes.desc: Culture and practices bridging development and operations — automation, continuous delivery, infrastructure as code, and fast feedback loops.

nodes.label:
CI/CD
Pipelines
nodes.desc: Automated pipelines for continuous integration and deployment — build, test, artifact management, and deployment strategies.

nodes.label:
Web
Development
nodes.desc: Building applications for the web, covering frontend, backend, APIs, and full-stack frameworks.

nodes.label:
Backend
Engineering
nodes.desc: Server-side development including APIs, databases, authentication, and scalable service design.

nodes.label:
Frontend
Engineering
nodes.desc: Building user interfaces for web and desktop. Covers HTML/CSS, JavaScript frameworks, state management, and accessibility.

nodes.label:
Mobile
Development
nodes.desc: Building applications for iOS and Android. Covers native, cross-platform frameworks, and mobile UX constraints.

nodes.label:
Human-Computer
Interaction
nodes.desc: Study of how people interact with computers. Covers usability, UX design, interaction patterns, and accessibility.

nodes.label:
Computer
Graphics
nodes.desc: Rendering, rasterization, and geometric representations for 2D/3D graphics. Covers shaders, ray tracing, and real-time rendering pipelines.

nodes.label:
Programming
Paradigms
nodes.desc: Advanced styles including functional, logic, reactive, and concurrent programming. Covers type theory and language semantics.

nodes.label:
Algorithm
Design
nodes.desc: Strategies for constructing efficient algorithms — divide and conquer, dynamic programming, greedy methods, and amortized analysis.

nodes.label:
Complexity
Theory
nodes.desc: Formal study of computational resources required by algorithms. Covers P vs NP, NP-completeness, and complexity classes.

nodes.label:
Data
Structures
nodes.desc: Organizations for storing and accessing data efficiently — trees, heaps, hash tables, graphs, and persistent structures.

nodes.label:
Linux
Systems
nodes.desc: Administration and internals of Linux-based systems — kernel, shell scripting, process management, and system configuration.

nodes.label: Virtualization
nodes.desc: Abstracting hardware to run isolated environments. Covers Type-1/2 hypervisors, VMs, and hardware-assisted virtualization.

nodes.label:
Distributed
Systems
nodes.desc: Design of systems across multiple machines — consensus, fault tolerance, CAP theorem, and replication.

nodes.label:
Processes
& Threads
nodes.desc: OS abstractions for concurrent execution — process lifecycle, thread models, context switching, and IPC.

nodes.label:
Memory
Management
nodes.desc: Techniques for allocating and reclaiming memory — virtual memory, paging, garbage collection, and memory safety.

nodes.label: Concurrency
nodes.desc: Managing simultaneous execution — locks, semaphores, condition variables, lock-free programming, and concurrency bugs.

nodes.label:
Network
Architecture
nodes.desc: Structural design of networks — OSI/TCP-IP layers, topologies, and network function virtualization.

nodes.label:
Internet
Protocols
nodes.desc: Core internet protocols: TCP, UDP, IP, HTTP, DNS, and TLS. How data is addressed, routed, and reliably transferred.

nodes.label:
Routing &
Switching
nodes.desc: Layer 2 and 3 traffic forwarding — VLANs, spanning tree, BGP, OSPF, and software-defined networking.

nodes.label:
Load
Balancing
nodes.desc: Distribution of traffic across servers for availability. Covers algorithms, health checks, and global load balancing.

nodes.label:
Wireless
Networks
nodes.desc: Communication over radio frequencies — Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, LTE/5G, and satellite. Covers modulation and protocol stacks.

nodes.label:
Network
Monitoring
nodes.desc: Observing network health and traffic. Covers SNMP, NetFlow, anomaly detection, and network management platforms.

nodes.label:
Infra as
Code
nodes.desc: Managing infrastructure through machine-readable config — Terraform, Pulumi, Ansible, and declarative provisioning.

nodes.label:
Platform
Engineering
nodes.desc: Building internal developer platforms for productivity — golden paths, self-service portals, and developer experience.

nodes.label:
Cloud
Architecture
nodes.desc: Designing resilient, scalable systems on cloud platforms — multi-region patterns, cost optimization, and service selection.

nodes.label: Observability
nodes.desc: Understanding system behavior through logs, metrics, and traces. Covers distributed tracing, alerting, and SLO management.

nodes.label:
Serverless
Computing
nodes.desc: Running code without managing servers — FaaS, event-driven triggers, cold starts, and managed service composition.

nodes.label:
Service
Mesh
nodes.desc: Infrastructure layer for service-to-service communication. Covers Istio, mTLS, traffic management, and observability.

nodes.label: Kubernetes
nodes.desc: Container orchestration system for automated deployment, scaling, and management. Covers Pods, Deployments, Services, Ingress, and Helm.

nodes.label: Databases
nodes.desc: Organized systems for storing and querying structured data. Foundation for relational, NoSQL, and NewSQL storage paradigms.

nodes.label:
Relational
Databases
nodes.desc: Table-based databases using SQL and ACID transactions — normalization, indexing, query planning, and PostgreSQL/MySQL.

nodes.label:
NoSQL
Databases
nodes.desc: Non-relational databases for flexible schemas at scale — document, key-value, column-family, and graph stores.

nodes.label:
Database
Internals
nodes.desc: How database engines work — storage engines, query planners, transaction management, and concurrency control.

nodes.label:
Data
Modeling
nodes.desc: Designing schemas to represent real-world concepts — ER diagrams, normalization, and dimensional modeling.

nodes.label:
Data
Warehousing
nodes.desc: Centralized analytics repositories — OLAP, star schemas, ETL pipelines, and platforms like Snowflake and BigQuery.

nodes.label:
Stream
Processing
nodes.desc: Real-time computation over continuous data streams. Covers Kafka, Flink, windowing, and event-driven architectures.

nodes.label:
Big Data
Platforms
nodes.desc: Distributed processing frameworks for large-scale data — Hadoop, Spark, data lakes, and distributed file systems.

nodes.label:
Application
Security
nodes.desc: Securing software against vulnerabilities — OWASP top 10, secure coding, threat modeling, and penetration testing.

nodes.label:
Network
Security
nodes.desc: Protecting networks from unauthorized access — firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and traffic analysis.

nodes.label: Cryptography
nodes.desc: Mathematical techniques for securing data — symmetric/asymmetric encryption, hash functions, PKI, and post-quantum methods.

nodes.label:
Zero Trust
Architecture
nodes.desc: Security model with no implicit trust — identity verification, micro-segmentation, least privilege, and continuous validation.

nodes.label:
Identity &
Access Mgmt
nodes.desc: Managing digital identities and resource access — OAuth2, SAML, RBAC, MFA, and directory services.

nodes.label:
Secure
Architecture
nodes.desc: Designing systems with security built in — threat modeling, security patterns, defense in depth, and secure decomposition.

nodes.label:
Security
Operations
nodes.desc: Day-to-day security team workflows — incident response, SIEM, threat hunting, and vulnerability management.

nodes.label:
Parallel
Computing
nodes.desc: Simultaneous computation across processors — OpenMP, MPI, data parallelism, and Amdahl's law.

nodes.label:
Distributed
Computing
nodes.desc: Computation across networked machines — MapReduce, actor model, RPC, and distributed storage.

nodes.label:
Performance
Engineering
nodes.desc: Systematic improvement of throughput and latency — profiling, bottleneck analysis, caching, and load testing.

nodes.label:
Cluster
Computing
nodes.desc: Tightly coupled computers as a single system — SLURM schedulers, MPI clusters, and high-availability setups.

nodes.label:
Accelerated
Computing
nodes.desc: Using GPUs, FPGAs, and TPUs to speed up computation. Covers CUDA, OpenCL, and hardware-software co-design.

nodes.label:
Multi-Agent
Systems
nodes.desc: Systems where multiple autonomous agents interact — architectures, communication protocols, coordination, and emergent behavior.

nodes.label:
Distributed Info
Systems
nodes.desc: Large-scale distributed data and information management — replication, consistency models, and distributed query processing.

nodes.label:
Solid State
Physics
nodes.desc: Crystal structure, band theory, and electronic properties of condensed matter. Foundation for semiconductor device physics.

nodes.label:
Experimental
Physics
nodes.desc: Design and execution of physical experiments — measurement techniques, error analysis, instrumentation, and scientific reporting.

nodes.label:
Quantum
Optics
nodes.desc: Interaction of light and matter at the quantum level — photon statistics, entanglement, laser physics, and cavity QED.

nodes.label:
Quantum
Field Theory
nodes.desc: Framework unifying quantum mechanics and special relativity. Foundation for particle physics and the Standard Model.

nodes.label:
Photonic
System Design
nodes.desc: Engineering optical components and systems — waveguides, modulators, and photonic integrated circuits.

nodes.label:
Optical
Metrology
nodes.desc: Precision measurement using light — interferometry, laser ranging, wavefront sensing, and vision-based inspection.

nodes.label:
Fibre
Optics
nodes.desc: Data transmission via optical fibres — single/multi-mode fibres, dispersion, amplifiers, and WDM systems.

nodes.label:
Mathematical
Modelling
nodes.desc: Translating real-world phenomena into mathematical structures — model building, validation, and sensitivity analysis.

nodes.label:
Discrete
Mathematics
nodes.desc: Mathematics of discrete structures — logic, sets, combinatorics, and graph theory. Foundational for algorithm analysis.

nodes.label:
Scientific
Computing
nodes.desc: Computational methods for scientific problems — numerical simulation, high-performance solvers, and software for research.

nodes.label:
Heat
Transfer
nodes.desc: Conduction, convection, and radiation mechanisms. Covers fin theory, heat exchangers, and thermal boundary layers.

nodes.label:
Continuum
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Mechanics of continuously deformable materials. Foundation for structural, fluid, and solid mechanics.

nodes.label:
Computational
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Numerical methods for mechanical problems — FEM implementation, mesh generation, and solver techniques.

nodes.label:
Engineering
Mechanics
nodes.desc: Application of mechanics to engineering problems — statics, dynamics, strength of materials, and structural analysis.

nodes.label:
Manufacturing
Engineering
nodes.desc: Processes and systems for producing physical goods — machining, forming, casting, quality control, and process optimization.

nodes.label:
Product
Development
nodes.desc: Systematic process of designing and delivering products — concept generation, prototyping, testing, and design for manufacturability.

nodes.label:
Microengineering
Design
nodes.desc: Design methodologies for miniaturized systems — MEMS design rules, cleanroom processes, and micro-fabrication constraints.

nodes.label:
Laser
Manufacturing
nodes.desc: Precision manufacturing using laser beams — cutting, welding, sintering, ablation, and micro-structuring.

nodes.label:
Signals &
Systems
nodes.desc: Mathematical analysis of signals and processing systems — Fourier/Laplace transforms, convolution, stability, and filter design.

nodes.label:
Circuit
Theory
nodes.desc: Fundamental circuit analysis — Kirchhoff's laws, Thevenin/Norton equivalents, AC analysis, and two-port networks.

nodes.label:
Digital
Design
nodes.desc: Design of digital logic systems — Boolean algebra, combinational/sequential logic, FSMs, and HDL synthesis.

nodes.label:
Electrical
Machines
nodes.desc: Theory and operation of motors, generators, and transformers — induction machines, synchronous machines, and drive characteristics.

nodes.label:
Mechatronic
Devices
nodes.desc: Design of integrated electromechanical devices — actuators, sensors, mechanical interfaces, and tightly coupled HW-SW systems.

nodes.label:
Power
Transport
nodes.desc: Transmission and distribution of electrical power — transmission lines, transformers, HVDC, and grid protection.

nodes.label:
Demand-Side
Management
nodes.desc: Managing energy consumption on the demand side — demand response, load forecasting, flexibility markets, and smart metering.

nodes.label:
Energy
Generation
nodes.desc: Technologies for generating and storing energy at scale — thermal, hydro, nuclear, and hybrid storage systems.

nodes.label:
Digital Health
Systems
nodes.desc: Software and data systems for healthcare — EHR, telemedicine, health data standards (HL7/FHIR), and medical AI.

nodes.label:
Medical
Diagnostics
nodes.desc: Therapeutic and diagnostic system design — radiation therapy, ultrasound, MRI, and interventional devices.

nodes.label:
Medical Device
Certification
nodes.desc: Regulatory pathways for medical devices — ISO 13485, FDA 510(k)/PMA, CE marking, IEC 62304, and risk management (ISO 14971).

nodes.label:
Product Lifecycle
Management
nodes.desc: Managing a product through all phases from conception to disposal — PLM software, configuration management, and digital thread.

nodes.label:
Process
Automation
nodes.desc: Automating industrial and business processes — PLC programming, SCADA, DCS, and robotic process automation.

nodes.label:
Industrial
IoT Security
nodes.desc: Security for industrial control systems — OT/IT convergence, SCADA security, protocol vulnerabilities, and industrial threat modeling.

nodes.label:
Future
Skills
nodes.desc: Skills increasingly critical in an AI-augmented world — AI literacy, digital transformation, ethical judgment, and human-technology collaboration.

nodes.label:
AI & Data
Skills
nodes.desc: Competencies for working with AI and data-driven tools — AI literacy, prompt engineering, and responsible AI practices.

nodes.label:
AI
Infrastructure
nodes.desc: Technical skills for deploying and scaling AI systems — MLOps, model serving, GPU computing, and AI platform engineering.

nodes.label:
Human &
Org Skills
nodes.desc: Organizational skills amplified by automation — adaptability, change management, and cross-functional collaboration.

nodes.label:
Industry
Transformation
nodes.desc: Domain-specific digital transformation — smart manufacturing, digital twins, industrial AI, and sustainability tech.

nodes.label:
AI
Literacy
nodes.desc: Understanding AI capabilities, limitations, and appropriate use. Covers AI concepts, use-case evaluation, and critical engagement with AI tools.

nodes.label:
Human-AI
Collaboration
nodes.desc: Skills for effective human-AI teaming — task delegation, output validation, trust calibration, and augmented decision-making.

nodes.label:
Data
Literacy
nodes.desc: Ability to read, interpret, and reason with data — visualization, basic statistics, and evaluating data quality and bias.

nodes.label:
Responsible
AI
nodes.desc: Developing and deploying AI ethically — fairness, accountability, transparency, privacy, and bias mitigation.

nodes.label:
AI
Governance
nodes.desc: Frameworks for governing AI use — EU AI Act, risk classification, auditability, and compliance reporting.

nodes.label:
Decision
Intelligence
nodes.desc: Combining data, AI, and judgment for better decisions. Covers decision frameworks, causal inference, and AI-assisted analytics.

nodes.label:
Model
Serving
nodes.desc: Deploying ML models as production services — inference servers, batching, versioning, and latency optimization.

nodes.label: RAG
nodes.desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: pairing LLMs with external knowledge retrieval — vector search, chunking, and context injection.

nodes.label: MLOps
nodes.desc: Operationalizing ML pipelines — model versioning, monitoring, retraining, feature stores, and ML platform tooling.

nodes.label:
AI Platform
Engineering
nodes.desc: Building platforms to train, evaluate, and serve AI models at scale. Covers compute clusters, experiment tracking, and model registries.

nodes.label:
Vector
Databases
nodes.desc: Databases optimized for similarity search over high-dimensional embeddings. Key component in RAG and semantic search systems.

nodes.label:
AI
Security
nodes.desc: Securing AI systems — adversarial attacks, model theft, prompt injection, data poisoning, and AI-specific threat modeling.

nodes.label:
Privacy
Engineering
nodes.desc: Building systems that protect personal data by design — GDPR, differential privacy, anonymization, and privacy impact assessments.

nodes.label:
Cyber
Resilience
nodes.desc: Organizational ability to prepare for and recover from cyberattacks — incident response, business continuity, and resilience frameworks.

nodes.label:
Adaptive
Problem Solving
nodes.desc: Solving problems in rapidly changing, ambiguous contexts — flexible strategy switching and navigating unstructured challenges.

nodes.label:
Change
Management
nodes.desc: Leading organizational transitions effectively — stakeholder communication, resistance management, and adoption of new processes.

nodes.label:
Workflow
Orchestration
nodes.desc: Coordinating complex multi-step automated workflows — DAG schedulers (Airflow, Prefect), event-driven pipelines, and human-in-the-loop processes.

nodes.label:
Industrial
AI
nodes.desc: AI in manufacturing and industrial operations — predictive maintenance, quality inspection, process optimization, and anomaly detection.

nodes.label:
Energy
Digitalization
nodes.desc: Digital transformation of energy systems — smart meters, grid management software, energy data platforms, and AI-driven forecasting.

nodes.label:
Green Software
Engineering
nodes.desc: Developing software with minimal environmental impact — energy-efficient algorithms, carbon-aware computing, and sustainable architecture.

nodes.label:
Prompt
Engineering
nodes.desc: Crafting effective LLM inputs — zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, and structured prompting techniques.

nodes.label:
LLM App
Design
nodes.desc: Building applications on large language models — agent architectures, tool use, memory systems, and evaluation frameworks.

nodes.label:
Model
Evaluation
nodes.desc: Assessing ML model performance, fairness, and robustness — benchmark design, red-teaming, and metric selection.

nodes.label:
Synthetic
Data
nodes.desc: Generating artificial datasets for ML training — GANs, simulation-based synthesis, and privacy-preserving data augmentation.

nodes.label:
Problem
Solving
nodes.desc: The meta-skill of structured thinking to understand, analyse, and resolve complex challenges. Foundation for engineering, design, research, and leadership.

nodes.label:
Problem-Solving
Mindset
nodes.desc: Foundational worldviews and habits for good problem solving — systems thinking, first principles, and intellectual humility.

nodes.label:
Problem
Framing
nodes.desc: Clearly defining and scoping a problem before solving — goal decomposition, constraint mapping, and reframing.

nodes.label:
Problem
Analysis
nodes.desc: Systematic investigation of a problem's causes and structure — root cause analysis, decomposition, and quantitative reasoning.

nodes.label:
Solution
Generation
nodes.desc: Generating a range of candidate solutions before committing — divergent thinking, analogy, and creative constraint use.

nodes.label:
Decision
Making
nodes.desc: Selecting the best option under uncertainty — trade-off analysis, risk assessment, and scenario planning.

nodes.label:
Execution
& Iteration
nodes.desc: Turning decisions into action through planning, monitoring, and iterative refinement.

nodes.label:
Collaboration
& Comms
nodes.desc: Working with others to solve problems — clear communication, facilitation, and alignment building.

nodes.label:
Systems
Thinking
nodes.desc: Seeing problems as parts of larger systems with feedback loops, emergent behavior, and unintended consequences.

nodes.label:
First Principles
Thinking
nodes.desc: Reasoning from fundamental truths rather than analogy — deconstructing assumptions to rebuild understanding from scratch.

nodes.label:
Probabilistic
Thinking
nodes.desc: Reasoning under uncertainty using likelihoods and confidence levels rather than binary thinking.

nodes.label:
Interdisciplinary
Thinking
nodes.desc: Borrowing models and approaches from multiple domains to solve a problem in a new context.

nodes.label:
Problem
Definition
nodes.desc: Precisely articulating what is wrong, for whom, and what the target state is. Prevents solving the wrong problem.

nodes.label:
Constraint
Identification
nodes.desc: Mapping hard limits and soft boundaries — time, money, regulation, and technical constraints.

nodes.label: Reframing
nodes.desc: Challenging the initial framing of a problem — asking whether assumptions need revisiting or the framing itself is wrong.

nodes.label:
Stakeholder
Mapping
nodes.desc: Identifying affected parties, decision-makers, and implementers. Essential for aligning solutions with real-world context.

nodes.label:
Root Cause
Analysis
nodes.desc: Finding underlying causes rather than treating symptoms. Covers 5 Whys, fishbone diagrams, and fault tree analysis.

nodes.label: Decomposition
nodes.desc: Breaking large problems into smaller, solvable subproblems. Enables parallel work and clearer ownership.

nodes.label:
Quantitative
Reasoning
nodes.desc: Using estimates, calculations, and models to reason numerically. Covers back-of-envelope calculation and sensitivity analysis.

nodes.label: Prioritization
nodes.desc: Focusing effort on the highest-leverage factors. Covers impact/effort matrices and value-based ranking.

nodes.label:
Divergent
Thinking
nodes.desc: Generating many ideas before filtering. Suspending judgment to explore a wide solution space.

nodes.label:
Inversion
Thinking
nodes.desc: Solving problems by considering the opposite — how to guarantee failure. Reveals blind spots and hidden risks.

nodes.label:
Trade-off
Analysis
nodes.desc: Evaluating what is gained and lost with each design or decision option. Core to engineering and product judgment.

nodes.label:
Risk
Assessment
nodes.desc: Evaluating probability, impact, and detectability of risks before committing to a path.

nodes.label:
Scenario
Planning
nodes.desc: Stress-testing decisions across best, base, and worst-case futures.

nodes.label: Experimentation
nodes.desc: Validating ideas through targeted tests and pilots. Covers A/B testing, prototyping, and build-measure-learn cycles.

nodes.label: Troubleshooting
nodes.desc: Diagnosing problems during execution — divide-and-conquer debugging, hypothesis testing, and systematic elimination.

nodes.label:
Iteration &
Refinement
nodes.desc: Improving solutions through repeated cycles of feedback and adjustment. Key to agile and continuous improvement.

nodes.label: Facilitation
nodes.desc: Helping groups think and decide effectively together — meeting design, visual thinking, and structured dialogue.

nodes.label:
Documentation
Practice
nodes.desc: Recording assumptions, decisions, and reasoning for future reference and knowledge transfer.

nodes.label:
Postmortem
Analysis
nodes.desc: Structured reflection after a project or incident — extracting lessons learned to prevent recurrence.

nodes.label:
Five
Whys
nodes.desc: Iterative technique for finding the root cause of a problem by repeatedly asking 'why'. Simple and widely applicable.

nodes.label:
Fault Tree
Analysis
nodes.desc: Top-down deductive analysis of failure modes using Boolean logic trees. Common in safety engineering and reliability.

nodes.label: Premortem
nodes.desc: Imagining a project has already failed and working backward to identify what went wrong. Surfaces hidden risks before they occur.

nodes.label: Chemistry
nodes.desc: The science of matter: its composition, structure, properties and transformations.

Organic
Chemistry

nodes.label:
Inorganic
Chemistry
nodes.desc: Non-carbon compounds, metals, coordination complexes and solid-state materials.

nodes.label:
Physical
Chemistry
nodes.desc: Thermodynamics, kinetics and quantum mechanics applied to chemical systems.

Electro-
chemistry
nodes.desc: Electron-transfer reactions, electrodes, batteries and electrodeposition.

Science

Surface
Science

Chemistry
nodes.desc: Quantitative and qualitative measurement techniques: spectroscopy, chromatography, titration.

chemistry

graphy

Synthesis

Polymer
Properties

Spectroscopy

Diffraction

Requirements

System

Verification &
Validation

Configuration
Mgmt

Interface
Mgmt

Traceability

Design
Reviews
